text: {"type":"DRAG_FILL","title":"","lessonText":"Practice these basic finger exercises to develop your piano skills.","data":{"challenges":[{"instruction":"Fill in the missing finger numbers for the exercise.","codeTemplate":"1 2 3 _ 5","options":["4","6","1","2"],"correctAnswer":"4","explanation":"The correct finger to use is 4, which completes the exercise."},{"instruction":"Identify the correct sequence of fingers for this scale.","codeTemplate":"_ 2 3 1 2 3 4 5","options":["1","2","3","4"],"correctAnswer":"1","explanation":"The first finger should be 1 to start the scale correctly."},{"instruction":"Complete the finger pattern for this exercise.","codeTemplate":"1 _ 3 4 5","options":["2","3","4","1"],"correctAnswer":"2","explanation":"The missing finger is 2, which fits the exercise pattern."},{"instruction":"Choose the correct finger for the following note.","codeTemplate":"_ 2 3 4 5","options":["1","2","3","4"],"correctAnswer":"1","explanation":"The correct finger to use is 1 for the first note."}]}}
